name: Object Memory
description: Photographic memory for your things. Snap a photo of where you put something; later, ask 'where are my keys?' and get a voice answer with location and time.

domains.object_recall: Help the user find objects they placed earlier. Match utterances like 'where are my keys', 'where did I leave my wallet', 'have you seen my passport', 'find my laptop'.
domains.place_naming: Name the user's current location. Match utterances like 'call this place home', 'mark this as office', 'tag here gym'.
